title: MADRAS SHELTER - 211info
text: MADRAS SHELTER SERVICE CENTER MADRAS SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 27-bed low-barrier overnight shelter with men’s, women’s and children’s, and wheelchair-accessible dorms, plus bathrooms, a community room, kitchen, and lockers. Offers meals for overnight guests and access to case management, showers, and laundry services. Volunteer opportunities are available. 61 NW Oak Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. One pet per household. Hours: Shelter: 7 days per week 6pm-7am; check-in 6pm-10pm. Lunch: 7 days per week 11am-12:30pm Dinner: 7 days per week 6pm-7:30pm Showers: Monday/Friday 7:30am-12:30pm Laundry: Thursdays 7am-1pm drop off, Friday pick up times vary Email (458) 800-4208 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 800-4208 Dave Colburn [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, walk in, or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jefferson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind Sonic Drive-In at 4th and Oak Streets. The Cascade East Transit bus 20 stops at the 4th Street Shelter Center 1 block from the location. Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - MADRAS SHELTER DAYTIME SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS SHELTER SERVICE CENTER
